summary:
Articaine has good safety profiles but may not provide adequate anesthesia through simple infiltration techniques especially when dealing with complex procedures requiring deeper blockades such as primary molar treatments. The exception here would likely pertain to its efficacy rather than other properties mentioned accurately by options provided regarding pharmacokinetics and toxicology aspects.
